name: M2 Machinegun
description: The M2 is a vehicle-mounted machinegun, firing 2bCal rounds and designed to fight infantry and unarmored targets.
author: Trej

name: M2/V Machinegun
description: The M2 is a vehicle hatch mounted variant of the M2 Machinegun.
author: Trej

name: M2/R Machinegun
description: The M2/R is an unmounted variant of the M2 Machinegun.
author: Trej
